CustomField.description: When enabled, the LLM is required to provide a confidence score (0-100) for every tool call made by this agent. The score is stored in ExecutionStep and AgentDecisionStep records and displayed as a badge in the Storyboard. Use MinConfidenceThreshold__c and LowConfidenceAction__c to act on low-confidence calls.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enable to track LLM confidence (0-100) on every tool call. Confidence scores appear as colored badges in the Storyboard and can be used to gate or guide uncertain actions.
CustomField.label: Enable Confidence Tracking
